name: codex-hud
description: A local session HUD for OpenAI Codex

interface.shortDescription: Inspect live Codex session and tool activity.
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD records supported lifecycle events into a sanitized local state file and renders a compact status line with model, Git branch, duration, tools, turns, agents, and token usage.
defaultPrompt: Set up the visible Codex HUD status line.
Show my current Codex HUD status.
Verify that Codex HUD is working.
